mapper.sql: base.BODY_HASH IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM snippet.snippet_base duplicate_base WHERE duplicate_base.SNIPPET_USER_NO = base.SNIPPET_USER_NO AND duplicate_base.DEL_YN = 'N' AND duplicate_base.BODY_HASH = base.BODY_HASH AND duplicate_base.SNIPPET_NO != base.SNIPPET_NO )

base.SNIPPET_NO , base.TITLE , base.SUMMARY , base.LANGUAGE_CD , language.LANGUAGE_NM , base.IS_FAVORITE , base.FOLDER_NO , folder.FOLDER_NM , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tag.TAG_NM ORDER BY tag.SORT_SEQ ASC SEPARATOR ', ') AS TAG_NAME_TEXT , base.VIEW_CNT , base.COPY_CNT , base.LAST_VIEWED_DT , base.LAST_COPIED_DT , CASE WHEN THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DUPLICATE_YN , base.REG_DT , base.UDT_DT

FROM snippet.snippet_base base INNER JOIN snippet.snippet_language language ON language.LANGUAGE_CD = base.LANGUAGE_CD LEFT JOIN snippet.snippet_folder folder ON folder.FOLDER_NO = base.FOLDER_NO AND folder.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN snippet.snippet_tag_map tag_map ON tag_map.SNIPPET_NO = base.SNIPPET_NO LEFT JOIN snippet.snippet_tag tag ON tag.TAG_NO = tag_map.TAG_NO AND tag.DEL_YN = 'N'

GROUP BY base.SNIPPET_NO , base.TITLE , base.SUMMARY , base.LANGUAGE_CD , language.LANGUAGE_NM , base.IS_FAVORITE , base.FOLDER_NO , folder.FOLDER_NM , base.VIEW_CNT , base.COPY_CNT , base.LAST_VIEWED_DT , base.LAST_COPIED_DT , base.BODY_HASH , base.REG_DT , base.UDT_DT
mapper.select: /* SnippetMapper.getSnippetUserByGoogleSub: 구글 식별값으로 스니펫 사용자를 조회 */ SELECT SNIPPET_USER_NO , GOOGLE_SUB , EMAIL , USER_NM , PROFILE_IMG_URL , USE_YN , DEL_YN FROM snippet.snippet_user WHERE GOOGLE_SUB = #{googleSub} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' LIMIT 1

/* SnippetMapper.getSnippetUserByUserNo: 사용자 번호로 스니펫 사용자를 조회 */ SELECT SNIPPET_USER_NO , GOOGLE_SUB , EMAIL , USER_NM , PROFILE_IMG_URL , USE_YN , DEL_YN FROM snippet.snippet_user WHERE SNIPPET_USER_NO = #{snippetUserNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' LIMIT 1

/* SnippetMapper.getSnippetLanguageList: 사용 가능한 언어 마스터 목록을 조회 */ SELECT LANGUAGE_CD , LANGUAGE_NM , EDITOR_MODE , SORT_SEQ FROM snippet.snippet_language WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_SEQ ASC, LANGUAGE_CD ASC

/* SnippetMapper.getSnippetFolderList: 사용자별 폴더 목록과 스니펫 건수를 조회 */ SELECT folder.FOLDER_NO , folder.SNIPPET_USER_NO , folder.FOLDER_NM , folder.COLOR_HEX , folder.SORT_SEQ , COUNT(base.SNIPPET_NO) AS SNIPPET_COUNT FROM snippet.snippet_folder folder LEFT JOIN snippet.snippet_base base ON base.FOLDER_NO = folder.FOLDER_NO AND base.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE folder.SNIPPET_USER_NO = #{snippetUserNo} AND folder.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY folder.FOLDER_NO , folder.SNIPPET_USER_NO , folder.FOLDER_NM , folder.COLOR_HEX , folder.SORT_SEQ ORDER BY folder.SORT_SEQ ASC, folder.FOLDER_NO ASC

/* SnippetMapper.getSnippetTagList: 사용자별 태그 목록과 스니펫 건수를 조회 */ SELECT tag.TAG_NO , tag.SNIPPET_USER_NO , tag.TAG_NM , tag.COLOR_HEX , tag.SORT_SEQ , COUNT(DISTINCT base.SNIPPET_NO) AS SNIPPET_COUNT FROM snippet.snippet_tag tag LEFT JOIN snippet.snippet_tag_map tag_map ON tag_map.TAG_NO = tag.TAG_NO LEFT JOIN snippet.snippet_base base ON base.SNIPPET_NO = tag_map.SNIPPET_NO AND base.SNIPPET_USER_NO = tag.SNIPPET_USER_NO AND base.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE tag.SNIPPET_USER_NO = #{snippetUserNo} AND tag.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY tag.TAG_NO , tag.SNIPPET_USER_NO , tag.TAG_NM , tag.COLOR_HEX , tag.SORT_SEQ ORDER BY tag.SORT_SEQ ASC, tag.TAG_NO ASC

/* SnippetMapper.getSnippetList: 조건에 맞는 스니펫 목록을 조회 */ SELECT
ORDER BY base.LAST_VIEWED_DT DESC, base.UDT_DT DESC, base.SNIPPET_NO DESC
ORDER BY base.LAST_COPIED_DT DESC, base.UDT_DT DESC, base.SNIPPET_NO DESC
ORDER BY base.COPY_CNT DESC, base.LAST_COPIED_DT DESC, base.SNIPPET_NO DESC
ORDER BY base.TITLE ASC, base.SNIPPET_NO DESC
ORDER BY base.UDT_DT DESC, base.SNIPPET_NO DESC
LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.size}

/* SnippetMapper.getSnippetDetail: 스니펫 상세 본문을 조회 */ SELECT base.SNIPPET_NO , base.FOLDER_NO , base.LANGUAGE_CD , base.TITLE , base.SUMMARY , base.SNIPPET_BODY , base.MEMO , base.IS_FAVORITE , base.VIEW_CNT , base.COPY_CNT , base.LAST_VIEWED_DT , base.LAST_COPIED_DT , CASE WHEN THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DUPLICATE_YN , base.REG_DT , base.UDT_DT FROM snippet.snippet_base base WHERE base.SNIPPET_USER_NO = #{snippetUserNo} AND base.SNIPPET_NO = #{snippetNo} AND base.DEL_YN = 'N' LIMIT 1
